assessment.note: He did not provide a recent example and instead asked for clearer examples of excellent junior-level work, signaling strong role-quality ambiguity and mild passivity.

new_queue.label: Excellent examples
new_queue.name: What examples of excellent junior-level work would make the bar clearer for you?
new_queue.description: Drills into the specific examples he says are missing so the evidence-stage ambiguity is concrete.

new_queue.label: Expectation mismatch
new_queue.name: Where do your standards for good work differ from mine right now?
new_queue.description: Names a likely source of misalignment without softening the gap.

new_queue.label: Feedback change
new_queue.name: What did you change in your process after the last round of feedback?
new_queue.description: Checks whether feedback translated into observable behavior changes.

new_queue.label: Blocked practice
new_queue.name: What part of your craft feels hardest to improve at the moment?
new_queue.description: Surfaces the specific growth block rather than a vague development wish.

new_queue.label: Next step
new_queue.name: What is the first concrete change you want to make before we meet again?
new_queue.description: Ends on an actionable commitment tied to the discussion.
